pi_items.source: ARGB color format verification: FF=alpha(255), FF=red(255), 00=green(0), 00=blue(0) equals pure red
Confirmed via ARGB hex value #FFFF0000 which represents red (255,0,0)

Verified as standard Windows Brushes.Green value - https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/answers/questions/254952/why-wpf-brushes-green-value-is-ff008000. ARGB: FF=alpha(255), 00=red(0), 80=green(128), 00=blue(0)
Confirmed via ARGB hex value #FF008000 which represents the standard green color (0,128,0) in Windows/.NET ecosystem
ARGB color format verification: FF=alpha(255), 00=red(0), 00=green(0), FF=blue(255) equals pure blue
Confirmed via ARGB hex value #FF0000FF which represents blue (0,0,255)
No authoritative source found specifying the exact percentage values for template opacity verification in NinjaTrader 8 drawing tools
No authoritative source found specifying tolerance values for opacity verification in NinjaTrader 8
NinjaTrader 8 documentation confirms font sizes are configurable in text templates but does not specify standard values

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating three custom NinjaTrader 8 drawing tool templates with specific colors and properties. Key verified facts: Supply zone uses red color (#FFFF0000), demand zone uses standard Windows green (#FF008000 equivalent to RGB 0,128,0), and note uses blue (#FF0000FF). The correct template directory is DrawingTool (singular), not DrawingTools as claimed in metadata. Template structure follows subdirectories by tool type (Rectangle, Text) containing named XML files. Font size 20 for text template is plausible but not independently verified. Opacity target of 20% and tolerance of 5% cannot be verified from available documentation.
